orman_response.think: Radiographic bone loss, generalized bleeding on probing, and mobility support a severe periodontitis label. The treatment draft must stay inside the curated scheme library.
orman_response.diagnosis: Generalized stage III periodontitis is the best-matching label in the seven-class schema.

treatment_draft.step: Initial periodontal education and oral hygiene reinforcement.
Escalate to specialist review for sites with persistent deep pockets.
